ucs.title: [LLM] Salt Typhoon (GhostEmperor) Demodex rootkit chain — BYOVD driver load + side-loaded DLL persistence
ucs.description: Hunts Salt Typhoon / GhostEmperor's signature persistence chain where a vulnerable signed driver (Cheat Engine's Dbk64.sys is the cluster's documented loader) is dropped to a writable path and registered as a kernel service, immediately followed by DLL side-loading via a legitimate Microsoft binary out of ProgramData/AppData. This combination — Cheat Engine BYOVD plus PlugX/Demodex side-loading — is uniquely tied to the GhostEmperor / Earth Estries cluster (Salt Typhoon, G1045) and is rarely seen outside this actor.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_name IN ("dbk64.sys","dbk32.sys","cheatengine*.sys","procexp152.sys","viragt64.sys","mhyprot2.sys","aswarpot.sys","truesight.sys") OR (Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\AppData\\*","*\\ProgramData\\*","*\\Users\\Public\\*","*\\Windows\\Temp\\*") AND Filesystem.file_name="*.sys") by host Filesystem.user Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.process_guid | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | join type=inner host [ | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("sc.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*create*type=kernel*","*\\AppData\\*.dll*","*\\ProgramData\\*.dll*")) OR (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("svchost.exe","services.exe","explorer.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*\\Public\\*","*\\ProgramData\\*")) by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process _time | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename _time as proc_time ] | where abs(proc_time-lastTime) <= 1800 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql: let drvDrops = DeviceFileEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where ActionType == "FileCreated" | where FileName endswith ".sys" | where (FileName has_any ("dbk64.sys","dbk32.sys","cheatengine","procexp152.sys","viragt64.sys","mhyprot2.sys","aswarpot.sys","truesight.sys")) or FolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\Windows\Temp\") | project DropTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, DriverPath=FolderPath, DriverName=FileName, Dropper=InitiatingProcessFileName; let drvLoads = DeviceEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where ActionType in ("DriverLoad","ServiceInstalled") | project LoadTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, LoadedDriver=FileName, LoadPath=FolderPath, LoadCmd=InitiatingProcessCommandLine; let sideLoads = DeviceImageLoadEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","DismHost.exe","BdeSvc.exe","AppLaunch.exe","GUP.exe","hkcmd.exe","igfxEM.exe") | where FolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\") | where FileName endswith ".dll" | project SideLoadTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, SideLoadedDll=FileName, SideLoadPath=FolderPath, Loader=InitiatingProcessFileName, LoaderCmd=InitiatingProcessCommandLine; drvDrops | join kind=inner drvLoads on DeviceId | where abs(datetime_diff('minute', LoadTime, DropTime)) <= 60 | join kind=inner sideLoads on DeviceId | where abs(datetime_diff('hour', SideLoadTime, LoadTime)) <= 24 | project DropTime, DeviceName, DriverName, DriverPath, LoadedDriver, SideLoadedDll, SideLoadPath, Loader, LoaderCmd, Dropper
ucs.rationale: GhostEmperor's Demodex rootkit deployment is documented (Kaspersky/Sygnia/Trend) as using Cheat Engine's Dbk64.sys signed driver to bypass DSE, then loading a Demodex/PlugX payload via DLL side-loading from ProgramData. Joining a vulnerable-driver drop+install with a side-loaded DLL inside a 24h window on the same host is a near-pathognomonic signal for Salt Typhoon (G1045) / Earth Estries — gener

ucs.title: [LLM] Salt Typhoon (Earth Estries) telecom CDR/PCAP harvesting — packet capture + GRE/SSH tunneling exfil
ucs.description: Hunts Salt Typhoon's signature telecom-targeting tradecraft: deploying packet-capture tooling (tcpdump, dumpcap, RawCap, pktmon) on jump hosts adjacent to lawful-intercept / CDR infrastructure, then archiving the capture and tunneling it out over GRE or non-standard SSH to actor-controlled multi-hop infrastructure. This intercept-data harvesting workflow is what distinguishes Salt Typhoon from other Chinese clusters (e.g. Volt Typhoon's ICS focus) and was the basis of the 2024 US telco breach reporting.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as sniff_time values(Processes.process) as sniff_cmd values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("dumpcap.exe","tshark.exe","windump.exe","tcpdump","RawCap.exe","pktmon.exe","NetworkMiner.exe") OR Processes.process IN ("*pktmon* start*","*netsh trace start*capture=yes*") by host Processes.process_guid | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | join type=inner host [ | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as archive_time values(Processes.process) as archive_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("rar.exe","WinRAR.exe","7z.exe","7za.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*-hp*","*-p*","*a *.rar*","*a *.7z*") by host Processes.process_guid | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` ] | where archive_time >= sniff_time AND (archive_time-sniff_time) < 7200 | join type=inner host [ | tstats summariesonly=true count sum(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytes_out values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as dest_ip values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_port from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.transport="gre" OR (All_Traffic.app="ssh" AND All_Traffic.dest_port!=22) OR All_Traffic.dest_port IN (443,8443,2222,53) ) AND NOT All_Traffic.dest_category="corporate" by host All_Traffic.dest_ip | where bytes_out > 50000000 | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` ] | table host user sniff_cmd archive_cmd dest_ip dest_port bytes_out sniff_time archive_time
ucs.kql: let sniffers = DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where (FileName in~ ("dumpcap.exe","tshark.exe","windump.exe","RawCap.exe","pktmon.exe","NetworkMiner.exe","tcpdump")) or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("pktmon start","netsh trace start capture=yes","-w ", "--write-file")) | project SniffTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, SniffProc=FileName, SniffCmd=ProcessCommandLine; let archivers = DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where FileName in~ ("rar.exe","WinRAR.exe","7z.exe","7za.exe") | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (" -hp"," -p"," a ") | project ArcTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, ArcCmd=ProcessCommandLine; let tunnels = DeviceNetworkEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d) | where ActionType == "ConnectionSuccess" | where (RemotePort in (2222, 8443, 53, 4443)) or (Protocol == "Gre") or (RemotePort != 22 and InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("ssh.exe","plink.exe","OpenSSH.exe")) | where not(ipv4_is_private(RemoteIP)) | summarize TunnelBytes=sum(toint(coalesce(LocalPort,0))), conns=count(), TunnelStart=min(Timestamp), RemoteIPs=make_set(RemoteIP, 25), Ports=make_set(RemotePort, 10) by DeviceId; sniffers | join kind=inner archivers on DeviceId | where ArcTime between (SniffTime .. (SniffTime + 2h)) | join kind=inner tunnels on DeviceId | where TunnelStart between (SniffTime .. (SniffTime + 24h)) | project SniffTime, DeviceName, AccountName, SniffProc, SniffCmd, ArcCmd, RemoteIPs, Ports, conns
ucs.rationale: Earth Estries / FamousSparrow / Salt Typhoon's documented telecom intrusions (Trend Micro 2023-2024, US CISA/FBI 2024) chain T1040 packet capture against signaling/CDR networks with T1560.001 RAR archiving and T1572 GRE or non-standard SSH tunneling through compromised SOHO routers (multi-hop proxy, T1090.003). The triple-join (sniffer → password-protected archive → GRE/non-22 SSH egress within 24
